textDisplay: I really liked this movie! Sometimes the trailer is better than the movie or it gives away too much. That really isn’t the case here, movie lives up to the energy of this trailer! The movie injects humor that is familiar to the franchise but this was a much darker, grittier film than before. Definitely worth seeing on the big screen!
We had Jason takes over Manhattan, now we have Scream takes over Manhattan... about time.
